title: Chicken Mozzarella Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions and drain.
Season chicken breast with salt and pepper and cook in olive oil over medium heat until cooked through.
Slice cooked chicken and mix with pasta, pasta sauce, and mozzarella cheese.
Heat mixture until cheese is melted and serve.

title: Broccoli Chicken Alfredo Pasta
instructions: Cook pasta and broccoli together until tender, drain.
Cook chicken breast seasoned with salt, pepper, and garlic powder until done and slice.
Make a roux by melting butter, stirring in flour, then slowly adding milk to thicken into white sauce.
Add mozzarella cheese to sauce until melted.
Combine pasta, broccoli, chicken, and cheese sauce and heat through before serving.

title: Baked Chicken and Broccoli with Pasta Sauce
instructions: Cut chicken breast into pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Place chicken and broccoli in a baking dish, drizzle with olive oil and pour pasta sauce over.
Bake for 25 minutes until chicken is cooked through and cheese is bubbly.
